title: microchilus borjaquijosae
intro: Microchilus borjaquijosae is a plant species commonly known as Borja's Yellow Vines, belonging to the family Apocynaceae, and is native to the Philippines. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Microchilus borjaquijosae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, making it a popular remedy in traditional Filipino medicine.
